description: Extracted dialogues from canonical Hindu scriptures

dialogues.speaker: Indra
dialogues.evidence: indra uvāca

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.scripture: Bhagavadgītā-4comm with the commentaries of Śrīdhara, Madhusūdana, Viśvanātha and Baladeva
dialogues.evidence: iti parāśaroktaiśvaryādibhiḥ ṣaḍbhir nityaṃ viśiṣṭaḥ | samagrasyety etat ṣaṭsu yojyam | he arjuna ! idaṃ sva-dharma-vaimukhyaṃ kaśmalaṃ śiṣṭa-nindyatvān malinaṃ kuto hetos tvāṃ kṣatriya-cūḍāmaṇiṃ samu

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.scripture: Bhagavadgītā-4comm with the commentaries of Śrīdhara, Madhusūdana, Viśvanātha and Baladeva
dialogues.evidence: śrīdharaḥ : nāhaṃ kātaratvena yuddhāt uparato 'smi, kintu yuddhasya anyāyyatvād adharmyatvāc cety āha arjuna uvāca katham iti | bhīṣma-droṇau pūjārhau pūjāyām arho yogyau tau prati katham ahaṃ yotsyām

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.scripture: Bhagavadgītā-4comm with the commentaries of Śrīdhara, Madhusūdana, Viśvanātha and Baladeva
dialogues.evidence: viśvanāthaḥ : bho vayasya arjuna ! tvam ātmā | na hanteḥ kartā, nāpi hanteḥ karma ity āha ya iti | enaṃ jīvātmānaṃ hantāraṃ vetti bhīṣmādīn arjuno hantīti yo vettīty arthaḥ, hatam iti bhīṣmādibhir arj

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.scripture: Bhagavadgītā-4comm with the commentaries of Śrīdhara, Madhusūdana, Viśvanātha and Baladeva
dialogues.evidence: śrīdharaḥ : bhagavato vivasvantaṃ prati yogopadeśāsambhavaṃ paśyann arjuna uvāca aparam iti | aparam arvācīnaṃ tava janma | paraṃ prāk kālīnaṃ vivasvato janma | tasmāt tavādhunātanatvāt cirantanāya vi

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.scripture: Bhagavadgītā-4comm with the commentaries of Śrīdhara, Madhusūdana, Viśvanātha and Baladeva
dialogues.evidence: ātmaivaupamyam upamā tenātma-dṛṣṭāntena sarvatra prāṇi-jāte sukhaṃ vā yadi vā duḥkhaṃ samaṃ tulyaṃ yaḥ paśyati svasyāniṣṭaṃ yathā na sampādayati evaṃ parasyāpy aniṣṭaṃ yo na sampādayati pradveṣa-śūnya

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.scripture: Bhagavadgītā-4comm with the commentaries of Śrīdhara, Madhusūdana, Viśvanātha and Baladeva
dialogues.evidence: śrīdharaḥ :saṃkṣepeṇoktāṃ vibhūtiṃ vistareṇa jijñāsuḥ bhagavantaṃ stuvann arjuna uvāca paraṃ brahmeti saptabhiḥ | paraṃ dhāma cāśrayaḥ | paramaṃ ca pavitraṃ ca bhavān eva | kuta iti ? ata āha yataḥ śā

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.scripture: Bhagavadgītā-4comm with the commentaries of Śrīdhara, Madhusūdana, Viśvanātha and Baladeva
dialogues.evidence: madhusūdanaḥ : sargāṇām acetana-sṛṣṭīnām ādir antaś ca madhyaṃ cotpatti-sthiti-layā aham eva | he arjuna | bhūtānāṃ jīvāviṣṭānāṃ cetanatvena prasiddhānām evādir antaś ca madhyaṃ cety uktam upakrame, i

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.scripture: Bhagavadgītā-4comm with the commentaries of Śrīdhara, Madhusūdana, Viśvanātha and Baladeva
dialogues.evidence: pūrvādhyāyānte viṣṭabhyāham idaṃ kṛtsnam ekāṃśena sthito jagat iti viśvātmakaṃ pārameśvaraṃ rūpam utkṣiptam | tad-didṛkṣuḥ pūrvoktam abhinandann arjuna uvāca mad-anugrahāyeti caturbhiḥ | mad-anugrahāy

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.scripture: Bhagavadgītā-4comm with the commentaries of Śrīdhara, Madhusūdana, Viśvanātha and Baladeva
dialogues.evidence: viśvanāthaḥ : indram indrajālaṃ māyā-mayaṃ vā rūpam ity arjuna mā manyatāṃ, kintu sac-cid-ānanda-mayam eva svarūpam antarbhūta-sarva-jagatkam atīndriyatvenaiva viśvasitum ity etad artham āha na tv iti

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.scripture: Bhagavadgītā-4comm with the commentaries of Śrīdhara, Madhusūdana, Viśvanātha and Baladeva
dialogues.evidence: baladevaḥ : evaṃ prārthito bhagavān uvāca mayeti | he arjuna ! draṣṭum icchāmi te rūpam ity ādi tvat-prārthitaṃ prasannena mayedaṃ tejo-mayaṃ paramaiśvaraṃ rūpaṃ vaidūryavad abhinetṛ-naṭavac ca tvad-a

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.scripture: Bhagavadgītā-4comm with the commentaries of Śrīdhara, Madhusūdana, Viśvanātha and Baladeva
dialogues.evidence: śrīdharaḥ : tato nirbhayaḥ sann arjuna uvāca dṛṣṭvedam iti | sa-cetāḥ prasanna-cittaḥ | idānīṃ saṃvṛtto jāto 'smi | prakṛtiṃ svāsthyaṃ ca prāpto 'smi | śeṣaṃ spaṣṭam ||51||

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.scripture: Bhagavadgītā-4comm with the commentaries of Śrīdhara, Madhusūdana, Viśvanātha and Baladeva
dialogues.evidence: iti sākāraṃ vastu | ubhayoś ca bhagavad-upadeśayor adhikāri-bhedenaiva vyavasthayā bhavitavyam anyathā virodhāt | tatraivaṃ sati mayā mumukṣuṇā kiṃ nirākāram eva vastu cintanīyaṃ kiṃ vā sākāram iti sv

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.scripture: Bhagavadgītā-4comm with the commentaries of Śrīdhara, Madhusūdana, Viśvanātha and Baladeva
dialogues.evidence: madhusūdanaḥ : guṇān etān atītya jīvann evāmṛtam aśnuta ity etac chrutvā guṇātītasya lakṣaṇam cācāraṃ ca guṇātyayopāyaṃ ca samyag bubhutsur arjuna uvāca kair iti | etān guṇān atīto yaḥ sa kair liṅgair

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.scripture: Bhagavadgītā-4comm with the commentaries of Śrīdhara, Madhusūdana, Viśvanātha and Baladeva
dialogues.evidence: viśvanāthaḥ : bho arjuna prathamaṃ śāstra-vidhim utsṛjya yajatāṃ niṣṭhāṃ śṛṇu | paścāt śāstra-vidhi-tyāgināṃ niṣṭhāṃ te vakṣyāmīty āha trividheti | svabhāvaḥ prācīna-saṃskāra-viśeṣas tasmāj jātā śradd

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.scripture: Bhagavadgītā-4comm with the commentaries of Śrīdhara, Madhusūdana, Viśvanātha and Baladeva
dialogues.evidence: Baladeva: vijñātṛtvābhimānam ivālakṣyārjunam atyājyatvād vidhānterṇopadiśati īśvara iti dvābhyām | he arjuna tvaṃ cet svaṃ vijṇaṃ manyase, tarhy antaryāmi-brāhmaṇāt tvayā jñāto ya īśvaraḥ sarva-bhūtān

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.scripture: Bhagavadgītā with the commentary ascribed to Śaṃkara (Adhyāyas 1-17)
dialogues.evidence: praśnabījaṃ pratilabhya arjuna uvācalabdhasamādhiprajñasya lakṣaṇabubhutsayā --- arjuna uvāca-

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.scripture: Bhagavadgītā with the commentary ascribed to Śaṃkara (Adhyāyas 1-17)
dialogues.evidence: śāstrasya pravṛtti-nivṛtti-viṣaya-bhūte dve buddhī bhagavatā nirdiṣṭe, sāṅkhye buddhir yoge buddhir iti ca | tatra prajahāti yadā kāmān ity ārabhya ā adhyāya-parisamāpteḥ sāṅkhya-buddhy-āśritānāṃ saṃn

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.scripture: Bhagavadgītā with the commentary ascribed to Śaṃkara (Adhyāyas 1-17)
dialogues.evidence: bahūni me mama vyatītāni atikrāntāni janmāni tava ca he arjuna tāny ahaṃ veda jāne sarvāṇi na tvaṃ vettha jānīṣe | dharmādharmādi-pratibaddha-jñāna-śaktitvāt | ahaṃ punar nitya-śuddha-buddha-mukta-sva

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.scripture: Bhagavadgītā with the commentary ascribed to Śaṃkara (Adhyāyas 1-17)
dialogues.evidence: etasya yathoktasya samyag-darśana-lakṣaṇasya yogasya duḥkha-saṃpādyatām ālakṣya śuśruṣur dhruvaṃ tat-prāpty-upāyam arjuna uvāca -

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.evidence: BhP_01.07.022/0 arjuna uvāca kṛṣṇa kṛṣṇa mahābāho bhaktānām abhayaṅkara / tvam eko dahyamānānām apavargo 'si saṃsṛteḥ //

dialogues.speaker: Vidura
dialogues.evidence: BhP_03.04.025/0 vidura uvāca jñānaṃ paraṃ svātma-rahaḥ-prakāśaṃ yad āha yogeśvara īśvaras te / vaktuṃ bhavān no 'rhati yad dhi viṣṇor bhṛtyāḥ sva-bhṛtyārtha-kṛtaś caranti //

dialogues.speaker: Vidura
dialogues.evidence: BhP_03.05.002/0 vidura uvāca sukhāya karmāṇi karoti loko na taiḥ sukhaṃ vānyad-upāramaṃ vā / vindeta bhūyas tata eva duḥkhaṃ yad atra yuktaṃ bhagavān vaden naḥ //

dialogues.speaker: Vidura
dialogues.evidence: BhP_03.07.002/0 vidura uvāca brahman kathaṃ bhagavataś cin-mātrasyāvikāriṇaḥ / līlayā cāpi yujyeran nirguṇasya guṇāḥ kriyāḥ //

dialogues.speaker: Vidura
dialogues.evidence: BhP_03.10.010/0 vidura uvāca yathāttha bahu-rūpasya harer adbhuta-karmaṇaḥ / kālākhyaṃ lakṣaṇaṃ brahman yathā varṇaya naḥ prabho //

dialogues.speaker: Vidura
dialogues.evidence: BhP_03.14.002/0 vidura uvāca tenaiva tu muni-śreṣṭha hariṇā yajña-mūrtinā / ādi-daityo hiraṇyākṣo hata ity anuśuśruma //

dialogues.speaker: Indra
dialogues.evidence: BhP_04.07.032/0 indra uvāca idam apy acyuta viśva-bhāvanaṃ vapur ānanda-karaṃ mano-dṛśām / sura-vidviṭ-kṣapaṇair udāyudhair bhuja-daṇḍair upapannam aṣṭabhiḥ //

dialogues.speaker: Vidura
dialogues.evidence: BhP_04.09.028/0 vidura uvāca sudurlabhaṃ yat paramaṃ padaṃ harer māyāvinas tac-caraṇārcanārjitam / labdhvāpy asiddhārtham ivaika-janmanā kathaṃ svam ātmānam amanyatārtha-vit //

dialogues.speaker: Vidura
dialogues.evidence: BhP_04.13.002/0 vidura uvāca ke te pracetaso nāma kasyāpatyāni suvrata / kasyānvavāye prakhyātāḥ kutra vā satram āsata //

dialogues.speaker: Vidura
dialogues.evidence: BhP_04.13.021/0 vidura uvāca tasya śīla-nidheḥ sādhor brahmaṇyasya mahātmanaḥ / rājñaḥ katham abhūd duṣṭā prajā yad vimanā yayau //

dialogues.speaker: Indra
dialogues.evidence: BhP_06.12.019/0 indra uvāca aho dānava siddho 'si yasya te matirīdṛśī / bhaktaḥ sarvātmanātmānaṃ suhṛdaṃ jagadīśvaram //

dialogues.speaker: Indra
dialogues.evidence: BhP_06.18.071/0 indra uvāca amba te 'haṃ vyavasitamupadhāryāgato 'ntikam / labdhāntaro 'cchidaṃ garbhamarthabuddhirna dharmadṛk //

dialogues.speaker: Indra
dialogues.evidence: BhP_10.27.004/0 indra uvāca viśuddha-sattvaṃ tava dhāma śāntaṃ tapo-mayaṃ dhvasta-rajas-tamaskam / māyā-mayo 'yaṃ guṇa-sampravāho na vidyate te grahaṇānubandhaḥ //

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.evidence: BhP_10.89.032/0 śrī-arjuna uvāca nāhaṃ saṅkarṣaṇo brahman na kṛṣṇaḥ kārṣṇir eva ca / ahaṃ vā arjuno nāma gāṇḍīvaṃ yasya vai dhanuḥ //

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.evidence: 1. ^kuharābhimukhajanamitravundhuvargaṃ prati tāta^ 2. ^granthāraṃmaḥ 3. prativṛṇvannaha 4. ^mastrupūrṇākulekṣaṇam 5. tamarjuna tena prakāraṇa prathamādhyoṅktena gātrāvasādamubhāṃśoṣa^ 6. kuruṇva ...

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.evidence: arjuna uvāca --- jyāyasī cet karmaṇas te matā buddhir janārdana / tatkiṃ karmaṇi ghore māṃ niyojayasi keśava //

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.evidence: tapāmīti / ādityātmanā sthitvā nidāghasamaye tapāmi kaiścid raśmibhiḥ / prāvṛṭkāle varṣam utsṛjāmi / kaiścit kiraṇair nigṛhṇāmy anyartāv aham evāmṛtaṃ jīvanam / mṛtyuś ca vināśaḥ sad asac cāham arjuna

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.evidence: tatparityāge na kenāyaṃ preritaḥ / pāpam evānudhāvatīty arjuna uvāca ---

dialogues.speaker: Indra
dialogues.evidence: śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca / pārvatyānantarotpanna indro vacanamabravīt / indra uvāca / tava svarūpaṃ hṛdi saṃvijānan samutsukaḥ syātstavane yastu mūḍhaḥ / ajānataḥ stavanaṃ devadeva tadevāhurhelanaṃ cakrapāṇe //

dialogues.speaker: Arjuna
dialogues.evidence: | pūrvaṃ jigāya bhuvanaṃ daśakandharo'sāvabjodbhavasya varato natu taṃ kadācit | kaścijjigāya puruhūtasutaḥ kapitvād viṣṇorvarādajayadarjuna eva cainam |
